use std::sync::Mutex;
use walkdir::WalkDir;

fn collect_all_paths(root: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let results = Mutex::new(Vec::new());
    WalkDir::new(root)
        .into_iter()
        .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
        .for_each(|e| {
            results.lock().unwrap().push(e.path().to_string_lossy().to_string());
        });
    results.into_inner().unwrap()
}
